case_title: TU, STELLA VS VAN JOHNSON, AGENT FOR PROCESSING OF RENT et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREW HAWKINS, EMPLOYEE, TENANTS RELATION

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TU, STELLA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VAN JOHNSON, AGENT FOR PROCESSING OF RENT ANDREW HAWKINS, EMPLOYEE, TENANTS RELATION THE CLAIM AND JUDGMENT ARE AMENDED TO ADD DEFENDANT CITI PROPERTIES DE, LLC AS THE CORRECT PARTY DEFENDANT. DEFENDANTS VAN JOHNSON AND ANDREW HAWKINS ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS INCORRECTLY NAMED AS PARTIES HEREIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO ANDREW HAWKINS.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY TU, STELLA AS TO DEFENDANT VAN JOHNSON, AGENT FOR PROCESSING OF RENT ANDREW HAWKINS, EMPLOYEE, TENANTS RELATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VAN JOHNSON, AGENT FOR PROCESSING OF RENT
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2007 ORDERED DESTROYED
APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF TU, STELLA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
